---
title: "KCMO Building Efficiency Tutorial 1: Dataset merging"
source: "Tutorial Material"
author: "Joseph Bodenheimer"
institution: "University of Kansas"
competency: [Programming Skills, Data Wrangling]
tech-lang: [Python]
main-format: "Jupyter Notebook"
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

This tutorial introduces a step-by-step workflow for exploring and preparing Kansas City building datasets from two different years for merging. It covers loading the data, standardizing key columns into a shared format, checking data completeness, data cleaning, and normalizing content. The module also shows how to perform exact matches by ID and address, leaving a smaller unresolved set for fuzzy matching in the next tutorial.

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/ku_Bodenheimer_Dataset_merging_KCMO_Buildings_Tutorial1)

This Material is under the [CC BY license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en)
